info.title: AuthorizationManagementClient
info.description: Role based access control provides you a way to apply granular level policy administration down to individual resources or resource groups. These operations enable you to manage role assignments. A role assignment grants access to Azure Active Directory users.

get.description: Get the child resources of a resource on which user has eligible access
Gets role assignment schedule instances of a role assignment schedule.
Gets the specified role assignment schedule instance.
Gets role assignment schedule requests for a scope.
Get the specified role assignment schedule request.

put.description: Creates a role assignment schedule request.

post.description: Cancels a pending role assignment schedule request.
Validates a new role assignment schedule request.

get.description: Gets role assignment schedules for a resource scope.
Get the specified role assignment schedule for a resource scope
Gets role eligibility schedule instances of a role eligibility schedule.
Gets the specified role eligibility schedule instance.
Gets role eligibility schedule requests for a scope.
Get the specified role eligibility schedule request.

put.description: Creates a role eligibility schedule request.

post.description: Cancels a pending role eligibility schedule request.
Validates a new role eligibility schedule request.

get.description: Gets role eligibility schedules for a resource scope.
Get the specified role eligibility schedule for a resource scope
Gets role management policies for a resource scope.
Get the specified role management policy for a resource scope
Gets role management assignment policies for a resource scope.
Get the specified role management policy assignment for a resource scope

put.description: Create a role management policy assignment

delete.description: Delete a role management policy assignment

isApprovalRequired.description: Determines whether approval is required or not.

primaryApprovers.description: The primary approver of the request.

isEscalationEnabled.description: The value determine whether escalation feature is enabled.

escalationApprovers.description: The escalation approver of the request.
